rationale.fidelity: Accurately keeps both methods on the same routing model, feasible set, constraints, and travel-plus-penalty objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly states the speed-quality-certification trade-off and conditions any recommendation on deadline, cadence, scale, or changed action.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly claim is made, and the proposed comparison is bounded to relevant instances and common conditions.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly rejects unsupported claims of field improvement or universal managerial value of exactness.
rationale.prose_clarity: Compact and readable, with only slight density in the comparison-metrics sentence.
rationale.overall: A near-ideal bounded managerial framing of the exact-versus-heuristic comparison.
